channel.title: MySafeOps — UK construction safety guides
channel.description: Practical articles for site managers and H&S leads: permits, inductions, toolbox talks, COSHH, and compliance.

item.title: Permit to Work App UK: What Good Digital PTW Actually Looks Like
item.description: A practical guide to choosing a permit to work app for UK construction. Hot work, height, confined space and electrical permits — what matters and what is hype.

item.title: Hot Work Permit UK: A Practical Guide for Construction Sites
item.description: What a hot work permit must include, common mistakes, and how digital permits help close out the fire watch properly.

item.title: Confined Space Permit UK: The Controls That Actually Save Lives
item.description: Atmospheric testing, rescue plans, and why digital permits keep arrangements visible when it matters.

item.title: Digital Toolbox Talks: How UK Construction Teams Are Ditching the Paper Register
item.description: Why teams move toolbox talks to mobile apps, what HSE expects from records, and briefings workers actually engage with.

item.title: Site Induction Software: Making the First 20 Minutes on Site Count
item.description: CDM 2015 induction duties, why paper fails audits, and what good induction software includes.

item.title: COSHH Register Software UK: Managing Substances Without the Binder
item.description: Replacing paper COSHH registers with apps: SDS version control, search, and evidence at the point of work.

item.title: Free Safety App for Construction Workers: Why Per-Seat Pricing Kills Adoption
item.description: How per-seat pricing breaks adoption on UK sites, and why free worker accounts keep permits and briefings honest.

item.title: RIDDOR Changes 2026: What UK Construction Firms Need to Know Before 30 June
item.description: HSE consultation on reporting injuries and ill health: dangerous occurrences, diseases, and the response window.

item.title: SafetyCulture Alternative for UK Construction: Honest Comparison for 2026
item.description: Pricing, UK compliance fit, offline use and per-user cost: what to look for when replacing iAuditor on real UK sites.

item.title: Best Permit to Work Software UK 2026: Honest Comparison for Construction Firms
item.description: Seven platforms UK firms actually shortlist: pricing, permit lifecycles, offline use and when each option makes sense.
